# 步骤2: 切换到WSL Linux侧，检查/下载Python安装包
Write-Host "`n=== 步骤2: 在WSL Linux侧准备Python安装包 ===" -ForegroundColor Green
wsl -e bash -c '
EXE_PATH="/home/yirongbest/py311.exe"
MIN_SIZE=20971520  # 20MB

# 检查文件是否存在且大于20MB
if [ -f "$EXE_PATH" ]; then
    SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null)
    echo "文件存在: $EXE_PATH, 大小: $SIZE bytes"
    if [ "$SIZE" -gt "$MIN_SIZE" ]; then
        echo "文件大小合格，跳过下载"
        exit 0
    else

    fi
else

fi

# 下载Python安装包（断点续传）
echo "开始下载 Python 3.11.9..."
curl -L -C - --retry 20 --retry-delay 5 -o "$EXE_PATH" https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.11.9/python-3.11.9-amd64.exe

# 验证下载结果
if [ -f "$EXE_PATH" ]; then
    FINAL_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null)
    echo "下载完成，最终大小: $FINAL_SIZE bytes"
    if [ "$FINAL_SIZE" -gt "$MIN_SIZE" ]; then
        echo "下载验证通过"
    else
        echo "下载大小异常"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo "下载失败: 文件不存在"
    exit 1
fi
'
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host "步骤2失败" -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 }

# 步骤5: 安装依赖 (pip, pywinauto, pyyaml)
Write-Host "`n=== 步骤5: 安装Python依赖 ===" -ForegroundColor Green
$PythonPath = "C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\python.exe"

# 升级 pip

if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {

    exit 1
}

# 安装 pywinauto 和 pyyaml

& $PythonPath -m pip install pywinauto pyyaml
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
    Write-Host "依赖安装失败" -ForegroundColor Red
    exit 1
}

Write-Host "依赖安装完成" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "步骤5完成" -ForegroundColor Green

# 步骤6: 验证安装结果

$PythonPath = "C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\python.exe"

Write-Host "`n--- 验证 pywinauto 和 yaml 导入 ---" -ForegroundColor Cyan

arguments.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

SSH_HOST="yirongbest@100.126.203.35"
SSH_PASS="2277"

# 使用 expect 自动处理 SSH 密码
cat > /tmp/ssh_cmd.exp << 'EXPECT_EOF'
#!/usr/bin/expect -f
set timeout 300
set host [lindex $argv 0]
set password [lindex $argv 1]
set script [lindex $argv 2]

spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new $host "powershell -Command \"$script\""
expect {
    "password:" {
        send "$password\r"
        exp_continue
    }
    "Permission denied" {
        puts "密码错误"
        exit 1
    }
    timeout {
        puts "连接超时"
        exit 1
    }
    eof
}
catch wait result
exit [lindex $result 3]
EXPECT_EOF

chmod +x /tmp/ssh_cmd.exp

echo "=== 步骤1: 停止旧进程 ==="
STOP_SCRIPT='
$procs = @("winget", "curl", "python", "py311", "python-3.11.9-amd64")
foreach ($p in $procs) {
    $found = Get-Process -Name $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    if ($found) {
        Write-Host "停止进程: $p (PID: $($found.Id))"
        Stop-Process -Name $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    }
}
Write-Host "旧进程检查完成"
'
/tmp/ssh_cmd.exp "$SSH_HOST" "$SSH_PASS" "$STOP_SCRIPT"

echo ""
echo "=== 步骤2: 在WSL侧准备Python安装包 ==="
# 检查WSL中的文件
WSL_CHECK=$(cat << 'WSL_EOF'
#!/bin/bash
EXE_PATH="/home/yirongbest/py311.exe"
MIN_SIZE=20971520

if [ -f "$EXE_PATH" ]; then
    SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null)
    echo "FILE_EXISTS:$SIZE"
    if [ "$SIZE" -gt "$MIN_SIZE" ]; then
        echo "SIZE_OK"
        exit 0
    fi
fi
echo "NEED_DOWNLOAD"
exit 1
WSL_EOF
)

echo "$WSL_CHECK" | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new "$SSH_HOST" "bash -s" || true

echo ""
echo "所有步骤已发送。请手动执行脚本 /tmp/ssh_install.sh 并查看输出。"

# PowerShell安装脚本 - Python 3.11 + pywinauto + pyyaml
param()

$procNames = @('winget', 'curl', 'python', 'py311', 'python-3.11.9-amd64')
foreach ($name in $procNames) {
    $procs = Get-Process -Name $name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    foreach ($proc in $procs) {
        Write-Host "  停止进程: $name (PID: $($proc.Id))"
        Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    }
}
Write-Host "旧进程检查完成" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host "`n步骤2: 在WSL侧准备Python安装包..." -ForegroundColor Cyan

EXE_PATH=/home/yirongbest/py311.exe
MIN_SIZE=20971520

if [ -f "$EXE_PATH" ]; then
    SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null)
    echo "文件存在，大小: $SIZE bytes"
    if [ "$SIZE" -gt "$MIN_SIZE" ]; then
        echo "文件大小合格，跳过下载"
        exit 0
    fi
    echo "文件大小不足，重新下载"
fi

echo "开始下载 Python 3.11.9..."
curl -L -C - --retry 20 --retry-delay 5 -o "$EXE_PATH" https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.11.9/python-3.11.9-amd64.exe

if [ -f "$EXE_PATH" ]; then
    FINAL_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null)
    echo "下载完成，大小: $FINAL_SIZE bytes"
    if [ "$FINAL_SIZE" -gt "$MIN_SIZE" ]; then
        echo "下载验证通过"
    else
        echo "下载大小异常"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo "下载失败"
    exit 1
fi
'@

#!/bin/bash
# 使用 sshpass + 多个独立 SSH 命令执行安装

HOST="yirongbest@100.126.203.35"
PASS="2277"
SSHPASS="sshpass -p '$PASS' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10"

echo "=== 步骤1: 停止旧进程 ==="
$SSHPASS $HOST 'powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { \$_.Name -match \"winget|curl|python|py311|python-3.11.9-amd64\" } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \"停止: \$(\$_.Name)\"; Stop-Process -Id \$_.Id -Force }"' 2>&1 | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== 步骤2: WSL下载Python安装包 ==="
$SSHPASS $HOST 'wsl -e bash -c "EXE_PATH=/home/yirongbest/py311.exe; MIN_SIZE=20971520; if [ -f \\\"\$EXE_PATH\\\" ]; then SIZE=\$(stat -c%s \\\"\$EXE_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z \\\"\$EXE_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null); echo \\\"文件存在: \$SIZE bytes\\\"; if [ \\\"\$SIZE\\\" -gt \\\"\$MIN_SIZE\\\" ]; then echo \\\"跳过下载\\\"; exit 0; fi; fi; echo \\\"下载Python...\\\"; curl -L -C - --retry 20 --retry-delay 5 -o \\\"\$EXE_PATH\\\" https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.11.9/python-3.11.9-amd64.exe; FINAL_SIZE=\$(stat -c%s \\\"\$EXE_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z \\\"\$EXE_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null); echo \\\"下载完成: \$FINAL_SIZE bytes\\\" "' 2>&1 | tail -10

echo ""
echo "=== 步骤3: 复制到Windows ==="
$SSHPASS $HOST 'wsl -e cp /home/yirongbest/py311.exe /mnt/c/Users/yuyirong/AppData/Local/Temp/py311.exe && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path \"C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Temp\py311.exe\") { \$s=(Get-Item \"C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Temp\py311.exe\").Length; Write-Host \"复制成功: \$s bytes\" } else { Write-Host \"复制失败\"; exit 1 }"' 2>&1 | tail -5

echo ""
echo "=== 步骤4: 静默安装Python ==="
$SSHPASS $HOST 'powershell -Command "\$p=\"C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\python.exe\"; if(Test-Path \$p){Write-Host \"Python已安装\";& \$p --version}else{Write-Host \"开始静默安装...\";\$proc=Start-Process -FilePath \"C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Temp\py311.exe\" -ArgumentList \"/quiet\",\"InstallAllUsers=0\",\"PrependPath=1\",\"Include_test=0\" -Wait -PassThru;if(\$proc.ExitCode -eq 0){Write-Host \"安装成功\"}else{Write-Host \"安装失败: \$(\$proc.ExitCode)\";exit 1}}"' 2>&1 | tail -10

echo ""
echo "=== 步骤5: 安装依赖 ==="
$SSHPASS $HOST 'powershell -Command "\$p=\"C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\python.exe\";Write-Host \"升级pip...\";& \$p -m pip install -U pip --quiet;Write-Host \"安装pywinauto,pyyaml...\";& \$p -m pip install pywinauto pyyaml --quiet;Write-Host \"依赖安装完成\""' 2>&1 | tail -5

echo ""
echo "=== 步骤6: 验证安装 ==="
$SSHPASS $HOST 'powershell -Command "\$p=\"C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\python.exe\";Write-Host \"`n=== Python版本 ===\";& \$p --version;Write-Host \"`n=== pip版本 ===\";& \$p -m pip --version;Write-Host \"`n=== 模块验证 ===\";& \$p -c \"import pywinauto, yaml; print('pywinauto:', pywinauto.__version__); print('yaml: OK')\";Write-Host \"`n=== 小豆芽检查 ===\";if(Test-Path \"C:\Program Files\xiaodouya\新版小豆芽.exe\"){Write-Host \"找到小豆芽\"}else{Write-Host \"未找到小豆芽\"}"' 2>&1

echo ""
echo "=== 所有步骤完成 ==="

# 远程安装脚本 - 直接在目标机器上执行
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$ProgressPreference = "SilentlyContinue"

function Write-Step {
    param([string]$Message)
    Write-Host "`n=== $Message ===" -ForegroundColor Green
}

function Write-SubStep {
    param([string]$Message)
    Write-Host "  > $Message" -ForegroundColor Cyan
}

# 步骤1: 停止旧进程
Write-Step "步骤1: 检查并停止旧进程"
$procNames = @('winget', 'curl', 'python', 'py311', 'python-3.11.9-amd64')
$stopped = 0
foreach ($name in $procNames) {
    $procs = Get-Process -Name $name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    foreach ($proc in $procs) {
        Write-SubStep "停止进程: $name (PID: $($proc.Id))"
        Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
        $stopped++
    }
}
if ($stopped -eq 0) { Write-SubStep "没有旧进程需要停止" }
Write-Host "步骤1完成" -ForegroundColor Green

# 步骤2: WSL侧准备Python安装包
Write-Step "步骤2: 在WSL侧准备Python安装包"

$wslScript = @'
EXE_PATH=/home/yirongbest/py311.exe
MIN_SIZE=20971520

if [ -f "$EXE_PATH" ]; then
    SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null)
    echo "FILE_EXISTS:$SIZE"
    if [ "$SIZE" -gt "$MIN_SIZE" ]; then
        echo "SIZE_OK"
        exit 0
    fi
    echo "SIZE_TOO_SMALL"
else
    echo "FILE_NOT_EXISTS"
fi

echo "DOWNLOADING"
curl -L -C - --retry 20 --retry-delay 5 -o "$EXE_PATH" https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.11.9/python-3.11.9-amd64.exe

if [ -f "$EXE_PATH" ]; then
    FINAL_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$EXE_PATH" 2>/dev/null)
    echo "DOWNLOAD_COMPLETE:$FINAL_SIZE"
    if [ "$FINAL_SIZE" -gt "$MIN_SIZE" ]; then
        echo "VERIFY_OK"
        exit 0
    else
        echo "VERIFY_FAILED"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo "DOWNLOAD_FAILED"
    exit 1
fi
'@

Write-SubStep "在WSL中执行下载脚本..."
$wslOutput = wsl -e bash -c $wslScript 2>&1
$wslOutput | ForEach-Object { Write-SubStep "WSL: $_" }

if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
    Write-Host "步骤2失败" -ForegroundColor Red
    exit 1
}
Write-Host "步骤2完成" -ForegroundColor Green

# 步骤3: 复制到Windows
Write-Step "步骤3: 复制安装包到Windows"
$WinTempPath = "C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Temp\py311.exe"
$TempDir = "C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Temp"

if (!(Test-Path $TempDir)) {
    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $TempDir -Force | Out-Null
}

Write-SubStep "从WSL复制 py311.exe..."
wsl -e cp /home/yirongbest/py311.exe /mnt/c/Users/yuyirong/AppData/Local/Temp/py311.exe

if (Test-Path $WinTempPath) {
    $Size = (Get-Item $WinTempPath).Length
    Write-SubStep "复制成功: $Size bytes"
    if ($Size -gt 20971520) {
        Write-SubStep "文件大小验证通过"
    } else {
        Write-Host "错误: 文件大小不足" -ForegroundColor Red
        exit 1
    }
} else {
    Write-Host "错误: 复制失败" -ForegroundColor Red
    exit 1
}
Write-Host "步骤3完成" -ForegroundColor Green

# 步骤4: 静默安装Python
Write-Step "步骤4: 静默安装Python 3.11"
$PythonPath = "C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\python.exe"

if (Test-Path $PythonPath) {
    Write-SubStep "Python 3.11 已安装"
    & $PythonPath --version
} else {
    Write-SubStep "开始静默安装..."
    Write-SubStep "安装参数: /quiet InstallAllUsers=0 PrependPath=1 Include_test=0"
    
    $Process = Start-Process -FilePath $WinTempPath -ArgumentList "/quiet", "InstallAllUsers=0", "PrependPath=1", "Include_test=0" -Wait -PassThru
    
    if ($Process.ExitCode -eq 0) {
        Write-Host "Python 3.11 安装成功" -ForegroundColor Green
    } else {
        Write-Host "安装失败，退出码: $($Process.ExitCode)" -ForegroundColor Red
        exit 1
    }
}
Write-Host "步骤4完成" -ForegroundColor Green

# 步骤5: 安装依赖
Write-Step "步骤5: 安装Python依赖"
$PythonPath = "C:\Users\yuyirong\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\python.exe"

Write-SubStep "升级 pip..."
& $PythonPath -m pip install -U pip --quiet

Write-SubStep "安装 pywinauto 和 pyyaml..."
& $PythonPath -m pip install pywinauto pyyaml --quiet

Write-Host "依赖安装完成" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "步骤5完成" -ForegroundColor Green

# 步骤6: 验证
Write-Step "步骤6: 验证安装结果"

Write-Host "`n--- Python 版本 ---" -ForegroundColor Cyan
& $PythonPath --version

Write-Host "`n--- pip 版本 ---" -ForegroundColor Cyan
& $PythonPath -m pip --version

Write-Host "`n--- 模块验证 ---" -ForegroundColor Cyan
& $PythonPath -c "import pywinauto; import yaml; print('pywinauto版本:', pywinauto.__version__); print('yaml: OK')"

Write-Host "`n--- 小豆芽检查 ---" -ForegroundColor Cyan
$XiaodouyaPath = "C:\Program Files\xiaodouya\新版小豆芽.exe"
if (Test-Path $XiaodouyaPath) {
    Write-Host "找到小豆芽: $XiaodouyaPath" -ForegroundColor Green
} else {
    Write-Host "未找到小豆芽: $XiaodouyaPath" -ForegroundColor Yellow
}

Write-Host "`n=== 所有步骤完成 ===" -ForegroundColor Green

    """使用交互式方式执行SSH命令"""
    if description:
        print(f"\n{'='*60}")
        print(f"{description}")
        print('='*60)
    
    full_cmd = ['ssh', '-o', 'StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new', 
                '-o', 'ConnectTimeout=30', HOST, command]
    
    # 启动进程
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        full_cmd,
        stdin=subprocess.PIPE,
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
        text=True,
        bufsize=1
    )
    
    # 设置非阻塞模式
    fd = proc.stdout.fileno()
    fl = fcntl.fcntl(fd, fcntl.F_GETFL)
    fcntl.fcntl(fd, fcntl.F_SETFL, fl | os.O_NONBLOCK)
    
    output_buffer = []
    password_sent = False
    start_time = time.time()
    
    while True:
        # 检查是否超时
        if time.time() - start_time > 300:  # 5分钟超时
            print("ERROR: 超时")
            proc.kill()
            return 1
        
        # 读取输出
        try:
            ready, _, _ = select.select([fd], [], [], 0.1)
            if ready:
                data = os.read(fd, 4096).decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
                if data:
                    output_buffer.append(data)
                    print(data, end='', flush=True)
                    
                    # 检测密码提示
                    if 'password:' in data.lower() and not password_sent:
                        print("\n[自动输入密码...]")
                        proc.stdin.write(PASSWORD + '\n')
                        proc.stdin.flush()
                        password_sent = True
        except (IOError, OSError):
            pass
        
        # 检查进程是否结束
        ret = proc.poll()
        if ret is not None:
            # 读取剩余输出
            try:
                remaining = proc.stdout.read()
                if remaining:
                    print(remaining, end='')
            except:

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
在目标Windows机器上执行Python 3.11 + pywinauto安装
通过SSH连接到Linux(WSL)侧，然后操作Windows
"""

import subprocess
import sys
import time
import os
import signal

# 配置
SSH_HOST = "yirongbest@100.126.203.35"
SSH_PASS = "2277"
WIN_USER = "yuyirong"
PYTHON_VERSION = "3.11.9"

class SSHInstaller:
    def __init__(self):
        self.ssh_base = ["ssh", "-o", "StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new", 
                        "-o", "ConnectTimeout=30", "-o", "PasswordAuthentication=yes",
                        SSH_HOST]
        
    def run_ssh(self, command, description="", capture=True):
        """执行SSH命令"""
        if description:
            print(f"\n{'='*60}")
            print(f"{description}")
            print('='*60)
        
        # 构建完整的SSH命令
        full_cmd = f"{SSH_PASS}\n"  # 密码输入
        
        try:
            # 使用subprocess执行，通过stdin发送密码
            proc = subprocess.Popen(
                self.ssh_base + [command],
                stdin=subprocess.PIPE,
                stdout=subprocess.PIPE if capture else None,
                stderr=subprocess.STDOUT if capture else None,
                text=True,
                bufsize=1
            )
            
            # 发送密码
            stdout, stderr = proc.communicate(input=SSH_PASS + '\n', timeout=300)
            
            if capture and stdout:
                print(stdout)
            
            return proc.returncode
            
        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
            print("ERROR: 命令超时")
            proc.kill()
            return 1
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"ERROR: {e}")
            return 1
    
    def step1_stop_old_processes(self):
        """步骤1: 停止旧进程"""
        cmd = '''powershell -Command "$procs = @('winget', 'curl', 'python', 'py311', 'python-3.11.9-amd64'); foreach ($name in $procs) { Get-Process -Name $name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \\"停止: $name (PID: $($_.Id))\\"; Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force
